A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent derived track_ids from a truncated candidate list (using head(50) in call_hSWTeLMtz5lZxtqbh44YZHYw) and then aggregated sales based on this limited set in call_yADnaCGVG48jHDLGq86b2jh2, likely missing relevant duplicates and thus mis-aggregating revenue, leading to the incorrect selection of iTunes instead of Amazon Music.

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used a simplistic LIKE-based entity resolution (SELECT ... WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%') to include only three track_ids before aggregating sales, likely missing other duplicates of the same song and thus incorrectly concluding iTunes had the most revenue instead of Amazon Music.

The agent summed sales for track_ids selected via a loose LIKE/OR filter (including records by "Bruce Maginnis" and variant titles) and aggregated on those (track_id IN 4122, 4628, 14080), thereby using incorrect/overbroad track records and producing iTunes as top instead of Amazon Music.
